system.powerDescription:
This power does NOT consume psyche. You cause any action you see within range to “fail”, rolling PSYCHE if targeting a supernatural effect or action and spending 1 Pathos on a success. You may not trigger this power against Severe Attacks. 

This could cause a SINs attack to miss, a gun to misfire, or a person’s speech to falter in front of a large crowd. This can range anywhere from mundane tasks to complicated actions. 

You may only use this power if you have at least 3 pathos.
